symptom: HTTP 429 Too Many Requests, sometimes seen before JSON parse
likely_cause: Yahoo throttling, bot protection, too many calls, or shared IP rate limiting
parser_action: Do not parse financial rows; write request diagnostic row with result_state=HTTP_ERROR_429
retry_or_triage_action: Back off; retry later; reduce request rate; capture User-Agent/headers; do not mark symbol invalid

parser_action: Store status, content type, body prefix; skip endpoint field extraction
retry_or_triage_action: Refresh session/cookies if allowed; test alternate endpoint/host; preserve raw response

symptom: HTTP 200 with result array present but length 0
likely_cause: Invalid/delisted symbol, unsupported endpoint, or filtered search/screener with no rows
parser_action: Set result_state=EMPTY_RESULT; keep null/blank data fields
retry_or_triage_action: Cross-check quote/search/chart; retry with canonical symbol and query fallback

symptom: HTTP 200 with expected top-level result equal to null
likely_cause: Endpoint anomaly, schema drift, access response mapped to null, unsupported parameter
parser_action: Set result_state=NULL_RESULT; preserve raw JSON and URL
retry_or_triage_action: Check Yahoo error object, HTTP status, content type, and URL encoding

likely_cause: Symbol not found, invalid range/module, or Yahoo backend error
parser_action: Store error code/description; do not emit normal field rows
retry_or_triage_action: Use error fields and cross-endpoint validation to classify

symptom: JSON returned but expected path missing or type changed
likely_cause: Yahoo changed endpoint response shape or added/removed fields
parser_action: Queue unknown/missing fields for master database review
retry_or_triage_action: Save raw JSON; compare field inventory to prior release

symptom: Search returns no quote hits for a common symbol/query
likely_cause: Query endpoint throttled, region/language issue, or query interpretation issue
retry_or_triage_action: Retry q=Apple for AAPL; include region/lang; verify quote endpoint

symptom: Predefined screener returns no result groups or quotes
likely_cause: Predefined ID invalid, endpoint throttle/access, region issue, or schema drift
parser_action: Set result_state=EMPTY_RESULT or NULL_RESULT depending JSON shape
retry_or_triage_action: Retry one screener ID at a time; do not tie failure to AAPL
